content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Once Again". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/582/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the array a.
content.outputFormat: Print the maximum number of pairs that can be formed.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and count the pairs of equal elements

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = sorted(map(int, input().split()))
count = 0
for i in range(n - 1):
    if a[i] == a[i + 1]:
        count += 1
        i += 1
print(count)
